name: vibe-coding-agent
description: Multi-channel AI Agent framework with shared sessions

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=bun && bun run build:ui
scripts.build:ui: bun build src/web/ui/pages/chat/App.tsx --outfile=dist/ui/chat.js --target=browser && bun build src/web/ui/pages/config/App.tsx --outfile=dist/ui/config.js --target=browser && cp src/web/ui/styles/*.css dist/ui/
